name: Sausage and Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the biscuits using a baking mix such as Jiffy or Bisquik, adding extra butter if desired for fat and calories.
2. Break up the sausage and brown it in a frying pan. Remove the meat and set aside.
3. Drain all but about 1/4 cup of the rendered fat from the pan. Turn off the heat and stir in the flour.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring continuously.
5. Return the pan to low heat and cook until thick and smooth, stirring occasionally.
6. Add the sausage back into the sauce. Turn off the heat and let simmer briefly to allow flavors to meld.
7. Taste for seasoning; additional salt may be needed, but pepper is usually unnecessary.
Source: Esther H. Vail, Rochester NY USA
Formatted by Fred Goslin in Watertown NY on Cyberealm Bbs.
